## Type of Issue

- [x] Bug: Something isn't working

### Issue Creator Checklist

- [ ] This issue has been thoroughly documented below; a developer should be able to understand the issue by reading it.

## What's broken?

List a description of the bad behavior or failure. Please be as detailed as possible. Attach screenshots if appropriate.

## What's the impact of this bug?

List the impact to the end user experience and/or application in general.

## Steps to Reproduce?

If applicable, list steps to reproduce the issue.

## Assorted Notes/Considerations

List any other information that you think is important.

## AC

List the acceptance criteria for this issue.
